objects.name: Analytic 1825
objects.description: Defender observes an app gaining input-observation capability (AccessibilityService enablement, default IME set, draw-over-apps permission), then creating an intercept surface (overlay window, accessibility event stream consumption or IME keystroke callbacks), followed by persistence (local keylog/clipboard dump) and/or small, frequent network egress. Chain: capability/permission → listener/overlay activation → bursty input read events → local write → near-term exfil.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Grant/activation of BIND_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICE, BIND_INPUT_METHOD, SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW, POST_NOTIFICATIONS for <pkg>

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Default IME changed/active: imeId=<pkg>, onStartInput/onFinishInput high frequency. TYPE_APPLICATION_OVERLAY|addView .* showing on top of package <otherPkg>

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Max time from input intercept to persist/exfil (e.g., 5–45s).
Minimum count of input events within window to flag harvesting (e.g., ≥5).
Require overlay creation if Accessibility not present (true/false).
Regex for keylog/clipboard dump destinations in app container.
Known-good analytics/CDN endpoints to suppress FPs.
Foreground/background/Work Profile or Kiosk policy to scope alerts.
